{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the nonlinear program\n\\[\n\\min f(x) \\quad \\text{subject to} \\quad c_e(x)=0, \\quad c_i(x)\\ge 0.\n\\tag{19.59}\n\\]\nThe multipliers $z$ correspond to the equality constraints in (19.2) and would therefore normally be unrestricted in sign. Nevertheless, show that the system (19.2) with $\\mu=0$, together with\n\\[\ns\\ge 0, \\qquad z\\ge 0,\n\\tag{19.3}\n\\]\nmay be interpreted as the KKT conditions for problem (19.59). Also explain why the multipliers $z$ in (19.2) can be regarded as the multipliers associated with the inequality constraints $c_i$ in (19.59)."}
